label: Subagent • computer_use through host (scripted toggle)
query: In System Settings, turn on Night Shift.
notes: Model-free. Drives the REAL computer_use host (SubagentSession + ComputerUseKind) against an in-memory ScriptedCUDriver via scripted agent_action JSON, so the whole host wrapper (recursion guard, live feed, done->success envelope mapping, compact result) runs in CI with no tokens. Asserts BOTH host parity (success envelope, computer_use result kind, CU feed kinds) AND the world state read back from the driver (Night Shift flipped on, Wi-Fi never touched).
